artifacts.summary: 4-phase relocation plan. Phase 1: git mv install.sh/update.sh/build-usb-installer.sh into scripts/ (move-only). Phase 2: update the 3 named docs. Phase 3: update the 8 additional live docs (resolves scope gap so no doc goes stale). Phase 4: stage work-scoped paths (never git add -A), repo-wide re-grep, run ./scripts/update.sh + ./scripts/install.sh, nix flake check green. Orchestrator owns the final commit due to concurrent task 92.

next_steps: Run /implement 85 to execute the plan. Implementer must use git mv (auto-stages) and git add on specific paths (never git add -A) before verification because flake root=self only sees git-tracked content. Keep the staged window small (concurrent task 92). Orchestrator owns the final commit.
